name: Junk Connector
name_jp: ジャンク・コネクター
desc:
2 Effect Monsters (Warrior and/or Machine), including a Tuner
Once per turn, during the Main or Battle Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster, using only materials this card points to. If this Link Summoned card you control is destroyed by battle or opponent's card effect and sent to your GY: You can Special Summon 1 "Junk" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck. (This is treated as a Synchro Summon.)
mnst_eff:
2 Effect Monsters (Warrior and/or Machine), including a Tuner

eff:
2 Effect Monsters (Warrior and/or Machine), including a Tuner
Once per turn, during the Main or Battle Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster, using only materials this card points to. If this Link Summoned card you control is destroyed by battle or opponent's card effect and sent to your GY: You can Special Summon 1 "Junk" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck. action: Can only use certain Synchro Materials
Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
Requires Tuner monsters as Link Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Synchro Summon
